Referee SAID MARTINEZ Robbed Ghana Black Stars to favour England. There was foul in the England penalty box where the goal keeper and the defender took down the Black Star player and referee Said Martinez ignored it. There was another foul where England Goalkeeper ignored the ball and completely took down the Black Star player. FIFA must level up the playing field for FAIR PLAY. Coaches must pause PLAY and call for VAR reviews right away. The world must give Referee Said Martinez RED CARD! Let's not speculate whether VAR was functioning or NOT; Referee SAID MARTINEZ must be sacked from FIFA for deliberately ignoring obvious fouls against England, a clear penalty for the Black Stars. Over 3 billion football fans in world concur that SAID Martinez should have awarded the Penalty and issue a RED to the England player who committed the foul. Why do we have Referees such as SAID MARTINEZ who don't know the basic rules of football? Ref. SAID MARTINEZ might have gotten a bribe from a prominent England fan, one will guess. As football fanatics, how do you explain such a poor officiating of this match?

actually Tuchel got this match horribly wrong. I saw Spence at left back and Anthony Gordon as LW, this is disaster because England left side completely useless. I definitely would've done things differently:-

Since Ghana plays much like Morocoo which deploy low block 5-4-1 when defending, my starting 11 goes like this -
a. GK - Pickford
b. RB - Reece James, two centre backs - Dan Burn and Konsa, LB - O' Reilly
c. Midfield - Anderson and Mainoo as 2 CDM, Mainoo replacing Declan Rice, Morgan Rogers or Eze as number 10 replace Jude Bellingham
d. Front 3 - Rashford at LW, Kane as CF, Madueke at RW

U might think dropping Rice and Jude Bellingham is insane, but when really think tactically and specifically this kind of opponents this is the right thing. What I would do is the whole team:
1. When defending - use 4-4-2 try press high, if press high fails (first pressure line bypassed) immediately drop to mid-low block since Ghana don't have creative hub while suffocate Semenyo and Jordan Ayew at the same time.
2. When have the ball, England can still have the 2-3-5 attacking shape but this time is completely different because I got 2 players O'Reilly and Reece James who both can do late runs and late crossing by Reece James. Basically will be even more dynamic depend on the scenario
